summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MIS Dashboard for loan management. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all authentication, CRUD operations, and analytics working perfectly. Frontend is 90% functional with core features working well, but has minor issues with delete functionality and UI interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Status dropdown requires keyboard navigation instead of mouse click
ui_bugs.workaround: Use keyboard arrows and Enter key to select status

ui_bugs.issue: Delete operation not removing loans from table properly
Modal overlay sometimes blocks interactions after edit operations
ui_bugs.workaround: Refresh page or press Escape key

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attributes for accessibility

passed_tests: User registration with email, name, and password
Dashboard page showing overview metrics (total applications, disbursed, declined, pending)
Dashboard showing conversion rate and decline rate
Create new loan application with all required fields
View loan applications list with filters (status, bank, search)
Navigation between Dashboard, Loans, and Analytics pages
Backend API authentication endpoints (register, login, get current user)
Backend loan CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend analytics endpoints (overview, by-bank, by-agent, by-month, unique-values)

medium_priority: Fix delete loan functionality - loans are not being removed from the table after delete operation
low_priority: Improve status dropdown interaction to work with mouse clicks
Add proper aria-describedby attributes to DialogContent components for accessibility
Fix modal overlay blocking interactions after edit operations
